title: Theme: Shopping and Clothing
description: Vocabulary for going shopping and describing clothes.

sentences.spanish: Necesito comprar una camisa nueva para la fiesta.
sentences.english: I need to buy a new shirt for the party.

sentences.spanish: Estos zapatos son demasiado pequeños, me aprietan.
sentences.english: These shoes are too small, they squeeze me.

sentences.spanish: La tienda de ropa tiene un gran descuento hoy.
sentences.english: The clothing store has a huge discount today.
How much does this black jacket cost?

sentences.spanish: Los pantalones cortos son perfectos para el verano.

ropa.mnemonic: Put on your rope (ropa) — your clothes!

zapatos.mnemonic: Zap your toes (zapatos) if you aren't wearing shoes.
